Title: The MYB family transcription factor TuODORANT1 from Triticum urartu and the homolog TaODORANT1 from Triticum aestivum inhibit seed storage protein synthesis in wheat

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: R2R3 MYB transcription factor; Myb-like DNA-binding domains at 14–61 aa and 67–111 aa
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Preferentially expressed in developing endosperm during grain filling (10–25 DPA); ~160-fold higher than in leaves, roots, and stems
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Overexpressed in developing endosperm of transgenic wheat at 10, 15, and 20 DPA; transient assays performed in immature endosperm at 15 DPA
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Seed storage proteins (glutenins and gliadins); starch
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Seed storage protein biosynthesis/transcription; likely affects starch accumulation
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: SSP genes including HMW-GS genes (Glu-1Ax1; Glu-1Bx7; Glu-1By9; Glu-1Dx2; Glu-1Dy12), LMW-GS genes (A3-620; D3-394; D3-441; D3-575; D3-578), and gliadin genes (TaGli-a-6; TaGli-a-8; TaGli-a-11; TaGli-a-14; TaGli-c-1; TaGli-c-6; TaGli-c-7; TaGli-c-10; TaGli-x-1; TaGli-x-10)
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Directly represses SSP gene promoters and transcription by binding MYB-related cis-elements 5'-T/CAACCA-3' and 5'-T/CAACT/AG-3'
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Endosperm-expressed direct repressor of SSP synthesis
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Endosperm-specific overexpression in wheat; RNA-seq; qRT-PCR; dual-luciferase reporter assay; transient overexpression in immature endosperm; EMSA; ChIP-qPCR; metabolite/protein profiling by RP-HPLC
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Glu-1Bx14 promoter (endosperm-specific) for stable overexpression; maize ubiquitin promoter (Ubi-1) for transient overexpression; 35S promoter in dual-luciferase effector
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Grain filling stages (10, 15, 20 DPA); field trials under normal cultivation at Dishang and Zhaoxian during 2017–2019
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Seed storage proteins determine wheat end-product quality; starch contributes to grain yield
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Overexpression reduced SSP gene transcription and decreased total seed storage protein accumulation by 13.38%–35.60%; also reduced total starch content by 3.10%–7.66%
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Reduced thousand kernel weight (4.95%–8.04%), grain width (1.39%–3.33%), grain weight per plant (8.83%–13.32%), and starch content; no clear changes in plant height, spike number, spikelet number, spike length, or grain number per spike
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful target for lowering SSP accumulation and modifying wheat quality; however, repression also reduces starch and yield-related traits, so deployment requires caution or tissue/stage-tuned engineering
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. TuODORANT1 is an endosperm-preferential R2R3 MYB TF from Triticum urartu. 2. In transgenic wheat, TuODORANT1 overexpression broadly represses SSP gene transcription during grain filling. 3. TuODORANT1 directly binds SSP promoters at 5'-T/CAACCA-3' and 5'-T/CAACT/AG-3' motifs and reduces total SSP accumulation in mature grain. 4. TuODORANT1 overexpression also correlates with reduced starch content and lower kernel/yield traits.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Gene source species is T. urartu, but functional effects were tested mainly in common wheat because robust T. urartu transformation was unavailable. Endogenous TaODORANT1 expression was not altered in TuODORANT1 overexpression lines.

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: R2R3 MYB transcription factor; includes TaODORANT-A1, TaODORANT-B1, and TaODORANT-D1 with conserved Myb-like DNA-binding domains
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: All three homeologs are preferentially expressed in developing endosperm; TaODORANT-B1 expression higher than TaODORANT-A1 and TaODORANT-D1; trace expression in roots, stems, leaves
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Developing endosperm during grain filling; RNAi evaluated at 15 DPA; transient overexpression in immature endosperm at 15 DPA
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Seed storage proteins (glutenins and gliadins); starch
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Seed storage protein biosynthesis/transcription; likely affects starch accumulation
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: SSP genes including HMW-GS genes, LMW-GS genes, and gliadin genes tested in vitro and in RNAi plants
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Suppresses SSP gene promoter activity and transcription
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Homologous endogenous repressor whose knockdown increases SSP accumulation in wheat grain
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Cloning of three homeologs; qRT-PCR expression profiling; dual-luciferase reporter assay; transient overexpression in immature endosperm; RNAi knockdown in wheat; qRT-PCR; RP-HPLC protein profiling
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Maize ubiquitin promoter (Ubi-1) for transient overexpression; RNAi construct targeting conserved exon fragment; 35S-related reporter system in dual-luciferase context
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Grain filling stages; field trials under normal cultivation at Dishang and Zhaoxian during 2017–2019
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Seed storage proteins determine wheat processing quality; starch contributes to grain yield
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Transient overexpression represses SSP genes; RNAi knockdown increases SSP gene transcription by 14.73%–232.78% and elevates total SSP content by 11.43%–19.35%; starch also increased by 3.57%–6.51% in RNAi lines
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Knockdown increased TKW (3.67%–7.77%), grain width (1.18%–3.54%), grain weight per plant (9.86%–16.39%); no clear penalties reported for plant height, spike number, spikelet number, spike length, or grain number per spike
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising target for wheat quality improvement and increasing SSP accumulation via knockdown/editing; may also improve starch and some yield traits
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. TaODORANT1 homeologs are endosperm-preferential MYB TFs in common wheat. 2. All three copies repress SSP promoter activity and SSP gene transcription in vitro. 3. Knockdown of TaODORANT1 increases SSP gene expression and total SSP accumulation in mature grain. 4. RNAi lines also show increased starch content and favorable kernel/yield-related traits.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Includes three homeologs TaODORANT-A1 (MN022889), TaODORANT-B1 (MN022890), and TaODORANT-D1 (MN022891) on 7AS, 7BS, and 7DS, respectively. Paper emphasizes TaODORANT1 as homolog of TuODORANT1 and an engineering target.
